title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAMBALITE PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO MAMBAUTE MUNICIPALITY OF DAET, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO GUITO PIMENTEL COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4763 / 60 OG No. 47, 7738 (November 23, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3954, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAMBALITE PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO MAMBAUTE MUNICIPALITY OF DAET, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO GUITO PIMENTEL COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Mambalite Primary School in the barrio of Mambalite, Municipality of Daet, Province of Camarines Norte, is hereby changed to Guito Pimentel Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
